prompt: Find the largest file in ~/Desktop/kinbench/081-tree/ (recursive search) and write its full path + size in bytes to ~/Desktop/kinbench/081-largest.txt. Setup planted a tree containing one ~1MB file alongside several smaller ones; identify the largest correctly. Fast path: cerebellum 'finder find_largest ~/Desktop/kinbench/081-tree/ ~/Desktop/kinbench/081-largest.txt'.
